display_text: Serrated Shiv, Tier 3: Neutral item granting a 20% chance on attack to have True Strike and deal bonus physical damage equal to 8% of the target's current health (bonus capped at 200 against Roshan). Provides a scaling damage source against high-health targets and counters evasion heroes. Stats: Proc Chance: 20%, Bonus Damage: 8% Current HP, CD: 1s.
